case_title: THOMPSON, MONICA VS MIRONOV, KONSTANTIN V.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY THOMPSON, MONICA AS TO DEFENDANT MIRONOV, KONSTANTIN V. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-26-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MIRONOV, KONSTANTIN V.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMPSON, MONICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIRONOV, KONSTANTIN V. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,030.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MIRONOV, KONSTANTIN V.
